meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn how to engineer SaaS pricing models for clients using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert guide.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap by pivoting to SaaS pricing architecture. Instead of building features, build revenue models. Use Antigravity to scaffold pricing logic and Claude Code to implement Stripe-integrated subscription tiers. This shifts your focus from 'what to build' to 'how to monetize,' instantly attracting high-value clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a freelancer's graveyard. You’re spinning your wheels waiting for the 'perfect' SaaS idea, while your competitors are already shipping revenue-generating pricing engines. The truth is, the market doesn't need more generic apps; it needs robust, predictable, and scalable subscription infrastructure.

By treating SaaS pricing as your core product—rather than an afterthought—you transform from a code monkey into a business architect. We’re going to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build a high-conversion pricing module that you can drop into any client project. Stop guessing, start building, and command premium rates.

steps.title: Architect the Subscription Schema
steps.description: Define the relationship between user roles and feature access. This sets the foundation for a scalable multi-tier pricing model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS platform with three tiers: Free, Pro, and Enterprise. Include fields for monthly/yearly billing cycles, feature flags, and usage limits.

steps.title: Scaffold the Pricing Logic
steps.description: Develop the backend logic that calculates pro-rated upgrades and downgrades to ensure billing accuracy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust pricing calculator function in Python that handles pro-rated billing transitions between subscription tiers.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Checkout
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the connection between your application and Stripe's API for secure payment processing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe integration module that creates a checkout session based on the chosen pricing tier.

steps.title: Design the Conversion UI
steps.description: Build a high-conversion pricing table that emphasizes the 'Pro' tier using psychological anchoring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive React component for a pricing table with three columns, highlighting the middle tier as the recommended choice.

steps.title: Implement Webhook Handlers
steps.description: Ensure your app stays in sync with Stripe by handling subscription cancellation and renewal events automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a webhook handler for Stripe events to update user subscription status in the database automatically.

pro_tips: Always offer a 'Yearly' discount toggle; it increases upfront cash flow by 30% for your clients.
Use 'Feature Gating' in the database rather than UI hiding; it's more secure and easier to audit.
Implement a 'Grace Period' logic in your webhooks to prevent immediate user churn on failed payments.
Include a 'Contact Sales' button for the Enterprise tier to capture high-intent leads even if they don't buy immediately.
Test your pricing logic with a 'Sandbox-first' approach using Stripe CLI before pushing to production.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing engine is live, deploy it as a standalone micro-service and offer it as a plug-and-play 'Billing-as-a-Service' module to your existing freelance clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn any idea into a profitable machine. Stop waiting for the perfect project and start building the infrastructure that every business needs. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
